---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: "Hailey Wileman"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to gender equality and how it correlates with regime type.
Maybe I could look at women education levels compared to men, or even women's suffrage in different countries.
